invention_text:
PATENTSCOUT — SAMPLE INVENTION DESCRIPTION (Test Case 1)
=========================================================

Title: Foldable Solar Charger with Integrated Battery Pack

Description:
A portable solar panel that folds into a compact case and charges mobile
phones via USB-C connection. It includes an integrated battery pack for
storing energy when sunlight is not available.

Key Technical Features:
1. Foldable photovoltaic panel array using flexible or rigid mono/polycrystalline
   cells enclosed in a hinged weatherproof case
2. Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) charge controller for optimal energy
   harvesting across variable sunlight conditions
3. Integrated lithium-ion or LiFePO4 battery pack (10,000–26,800 mAh range)
   for energy storage when sunlight is unavailable
4. USB-C Power Delivery (PD) output port supporting up to 65W fast charging
5. USB-A legacy output port for simultaneous device charging
6. LED charge status indicator and battery level display
7. Over-voltage, over-current, and short-circuit protection circuitry

Expected Patent Landscape:
- High patent density area — solar portable chargers are a mature category
- Expected assignees: Anker, Goal Zero, BioLite, RAVPower, Jackery, Renogy
- Relevant CPC codes: H02J7/35, H01L31/042, H02S10/30, H02J7/00

Use this description as a sample input when testing PatentScout. Paste the
text above the dashed line into the "Describe your invention" text area in
the sidebar and click Analyze.

features.label: Photovoltaic Panel Array
features.description: A collection of photovoltaic cells arranged to convert solar radiation into direct current electrical energy.
features.patent_language: A plurality of photovoltaic cells configured to convert solar radiation into direct current electrical energy.

features.label: Folding Panel Structure
features.description: A mechanical assembly enabling the photovoltaic panel array to collapse or articulate into a reduced volume configuration for portability.
features.patent_language: A mechanical assembly configured to enable a photovoltaic panel array to articulate into a reduced volume configuration for portability.

features.label: Compact Protective Enclosure
features.description: A housing designed to encapsulate and protect the folded solar panel and associated electronics, facilitating transport and providing durability.
features.patent_language: A housing configured to encapsulate and protect a folded solar panel and associated electronics, thereby facilitating transport and providing durability.

features.label: Integrated Energy Storage Unit
features.description: A rechargeable battery pack directly incorporated within the device for accumulating and retaining electrical energy generated by the solar panel.
features.patent_language: A rechargeable battery pack incorporated within the device, configured to accumulate and retain electrical energy generated by the solar panel.

features.label: Universal Serial Bus Type-C Interface
features.description: A reversible electrical connector port configured to provide power output for charging external electronic devices, such as mobile phones, in accordance with the USB-C standard.
features.patent_language: A reversible electrical connector port configured to provide power output for charging external electronic devices, wherein said port is USB-C compliant.

features.label: Charge Controller Circuitry
features.description: An electronic circuit responsible for regulating the power flow from the solar panel to the integrated battery pack and to the USB-C output, preventing overcharge or deep discharge.
features.patent_language: An electronic circuit configured to regulate power flow from the solar panel to the battery pack and USB-C output, preventing overcharge or deep discharge.

cpc_codes.rationale: This code specifically covers arrangements or mounting of solar panels for portable applications, directly matching the invention's nature.
This code is highly relevant as it pertains to circuit arrangements for charging batteries using solar energy, a core function of the invention.
This broader code covers general circuit arrangements for charging or discharging batteries, encompassing the integrated battery pack's management.
This code applies to the fundamental technology of arrangements of solar cells or solar panels for converting solar energy into electric energy.

detail_patents.title: Portable solar charger with foldable photovoltaic panel array
detail_patents.abstract: A portable solar charger comprising a plurality of foldable monocrystalline silicon photovoltaic panels connected in series, a maximum power point tracking (MPPT) charge controller, an integrated lithium-ion battery pack, and a USB-C output port. The panels fold into a compact housing for transport and unfold to expose a combined surface area sufficient for charging mobile electronic devices.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered charging apparatus with articulated panel segments
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered charging apparatus having a plurality of articulated photovoltaic panel segments connected by hinged joints, a charge regulation circuit with MPPT tracking, and a rechargeable battery. The articulated segments allow the apparatus to be folded into a compact form factor for portability while providing efficient solar energy harvesting when deployed.

detail_patents.title: Foldable solar panel assembly with integrated battery and charge controller
detail_patents.abstract: A foldable solar panel assembly including at least four photovoltaic cell panels pivotally connected, an embedded lithium polymer battery, a solar charge controller with pulse-width modulation, and multiple USB output ports including USB-C. The assembly transitions between a folded transport configuration and a deployed charging configuration.

detail_patents.title: Compact photovoltaic charger with maximum power point tracking
detail_patents.abstract: A compact photovoltaic charger device comprising polycrystalline silicon solar cells arranged in a foldable configuration, an MPPT charge controller that continuously optimizes power extraction from the solar cells, an internal energy storage unit, and a Type-C universal serial bus interface for charging external devices.

detail_patents.title: Solar energy harvesting device with collapsible panel structure
detail_patents.abstract: A solar energy harvesting device including a collapsible panel structure having three or more photovoltaic panels connected by flexible hinges, a power management integrated circuit, a lithium-ion battery module, and USB power delivery circuitry. The panels collapse into a stackable configuration for easy transport.

detail_patents.title: Portable photovoltaic power supply with articulated solar panels
detail_patents.abstract: A portable photovoltaic power supply comprising articulated solar panels with monocrystalline cells, a solar charge regulation circuit, an internal rechargeable battery, and a reversible USB-C connector. The articulated panels are configured to track incident sunlight angle for improved efficiency.

detail_patents.title: Solar cell charger apparatus with folding mechanism and MPPT controller
detail_patents.abstract: Disclosed is a solar cell charger apparatus including a plurality of thin-film solar cells mounted on foldable substrate panels, an MPPT controller that adjusts operating voltage to maximize power output, and an integrated lithium battery with USB-C power delivery output port.

detail_patents.title: Multi-panel solar charging system with collapsible housing
detail_patents.abstract: A multi-panel solar charging system comprising a collapsible protective housing containing a plurality of high-efficiency monocrystalline photovoltaic panels, a charge controller, a battery management system, and multiple output ports. The housing protects the panels during transport and serves as a support structure during deployment.

detail_patents.title: Photovoltaic portable charger with solar tracking and USB-C output
detail_patents.abstract: A photovoltaic portable charger having a foldable panel array with solar tracking capability, an MPPT charge controller, an embedded battery pack, and a USB-C power delivery interface. A sensor detects optimal sun angle and adjusts panel orientation accordingly.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered portable electronic device charger
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered portable electronic device charger comprising at least two foldable photovoltaic panels, a DC-DC converter with maximum power point tracking, a rechargeable lithium-ion energy storage unit, and a USB Type-C output connector for charging smartphones, tablets, and other USB-powered devices.

detail_patents.title: Lightweight foldable solar panel with integrated energy storage
detail_patents.abstract: A lightweight foldable solar panel system including thin-film photovoltaic cells laminated onto flexible substrates that fold accordion-style, an integrated lithium polymer battery for energy storage, a charge controller with MPPT, and USB-A and USB-C output ports.

detail_patents.title: Solar charger with adjustable panel angle and power management
detail_patents.abstract: A solar charger device comprising a set of photovoltaic panels with adjustable tilt angles, a power management unit with MPPT algorithm implementation, an integrated battery module, and a USB-C fast-charging output port. The adjustable panel mechanism optimizes solar energy capture at different latitudes.

detail_patents.title: Portable solar power bank with foldable panel array
detail_patents.abstract: A portable solar power bank integrating a foldable photovoltaic panel array, a lithium-ion battery with battery management system, a solar charge controller implementing MPPT, and dual USB output ports including at least one USB-C port with power delivery support.

detail_patents.title: Solar panel assembly with hinge mechanism for portable charging
detail_patents.abstract: A solar panel assembly for portable charging comprising photovoltaic panels connected by a hinge mechanism allowing folding and unfolding, a charge regulation circuit, and an embedded rechargeable battery with USB-C output. The hinge mechanism enables the panels to fold flat for compact storage.

detail_patents.title: Photovoltaic charging device with integrated MPPT controller
detail_patents.abstract: A photovoltaic charging device comprising a plurality of solar cells arranged on deployable panel segments, an integrated MPPT controller that maximizes power extraction under varying light conditions, a lithium-ion energy storage battery, and a USB-C power output port.

detail_patents.title: Foldable solar energy collection device with charge management
detail_patents.abstract: A foldable solar energy collection device including silicon-based photovoltaic panels on articulated substrates, a charge management system with MPPT tracking and battery protection circuits, a lithium polymer rechargeable battery, and external device charging interface via USB-C.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered USB charger with collapsible photovoltaic array
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered USB charger comprising a collapsible photovoltaic array having multiple solar cell panels connected by flexible joints, a solar charge controller, an integrated battery pack, and a USB-C output port configured for fast charging of mobile devices.

detail_patents.title: Portable solar module with folding structure and power delivery
detail_patents.abstract: A portable solar module including photovoltaic cells on a folding structure that deploys to increase solar collection area, a power conditioning unit with MPPT, an internal lithium-ion battery, and a USB-C port with power delivery protocol support for charging electronic devices.

detail_patents.title: Solar panel charger with automatic deployment mechanism
detail_patents.abstract: A solar panel charger having an automatic deployment mechanism that transitions between storage and operational configurations, photovoltaic cells for solar energy conversion, an MPPT charge controller, an integrated battery, and USB output ports including Type-C.

detail_patents.title: Compact solar energy conversion device with battery management

The device converts solar irradiance into electrical energy for storage and subsequent use in charging personal electronic devices.

detail_patents.title: Solar cell panel array with protective foldable enclosure

detail_patents.title: Solar powered device charger with roll-up panel design

detail_patents.abstract: A solar charge controller for portable solar chargers implementing an adaptive MPPT algorithm that adjusts to varying solar irradiance conditions, coupled with a lithium-ion battery protection circuit and USB-C output power regulation for efficient mobile device charging.

detail_patents.title: Power conditioning circuit for foldable solar charger
detail_patents.abstract: A power conditioning circuit for a foldable solar charger comprising a DC-DC boost converter with MPPT, a battery charging circuit with constant current/constant voltage profiles, and a USB-C power delivery controller for regulated output to external devices.

Variant 76 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar charging pad with flexible photovoltaic cells module
detail_patents.abstract: A solar charging pad incorporating flexible thin-film photovoltaic cells that conform to curved surfaces, an MPPT charge controller, an integrated flat lithium polymer battery, and USB-C output. The pad can be rolled or folded for portable use. Variant 77 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Modular solar charger with interconnectable photovoltaic units unit
detail_patents.abstract: A modular solar charger system comprising interconnectable photovoltaic units each containing solar cells, a shared MPPT controller, a centralized battery management system, and USB-C power delivery output. Units connect magnetically to scale charging capacity. Variant 78 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar backpack charger with integrated photovoltaic panel design
detail_patents.abstract: A solar backpack charger integrating a photovoltaic panel into the exterior fabric of a backpack, connected to an internal MPPT charge controller, a lithium-ion battery pack, and a USB-C output port accessible inside the backpack compartment. Variant 79 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Battery management system for solar powered portable charger arrangement
detail_patents.abstract: A battery management system (BMS) for use with a portable solar charger, comprising charge state monitoring circuitry, overcharge and overdischarge protection, temperature sensing, and cell balancing for a lithium-ion battery connected to photovoltaic solar panels via an MPPT charge controller with USB-C output. Variant 80 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar charge controller with adaptive MPPT algorithm configuration
detail_patents.abstract: A solar charge controller for portable solar chargers implementing an adaptive MPPT algorithm that adjusts to varying solar irradiance conditions, coupled with a lithium-ion battery protection circuit and USB-C output power regulation for efficient mobile device charging. Variant 81 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Power conditioning circuit for foldable solar charger system
detail_patents.abstract: A power conditioning circuit for a foldable solar charger comprising a DC-DC boost converter with MPPT, a battery charging circuit with constant current/constant voltage profiles, and a USB-C power delivery controller for regulated output to external devices. Variant 82 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar energy storage apparatus with photovoltaic charging interface apparatus
detail_patents.abstract: A solar energy storage apparatus including a high-capacity lithium-ion battery, a photovoltaic charging interface connected to external or integrated solar panels, an MPPT charge controller, and multiple USB output ports including USB-C with power delivery support. Variant 83 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Portable solar generator with foldable panels and inverter mechanism
detail_patents.abstract: A portable solar generator comprising foldable monocrystalline photovoltaic panels, a lithium iron phosphate battery, an MPPT solar charge controller, a pure sine wave inverter for AC output, and USB-C DC output ports for directly charging electronic devices. Variant 84 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar cell efficiency enhancement structure for portable applications structure
detail_patents.abstract: A solar cell efficiency enhancement structure for portable photovoltaic charging applications, comprising a light concentrating element positioned above monocrystalline solar cells to increase photon capture, used with foldable solar charger assemblies with MPPT monitoring. Variant 85 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Waterproof solar charger with sealed photovoltaic panel enclosure assembly
detail_patents.abstract: A waterproof solar charger comprising sealed photovoltaic panels in an IP67-rated enclosure, a conformal-coated MPPT charge controller, a lithium-ion battery with waterproof USB-C output connector, suitable for outdoor and marine solar charging applications. Variant 86 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar panel interconnect system for portable charger arrays module
detail_patents.abstract: A solar panel interconnect system for connecting multiple photovoltaic panels in a portable charger array configuration, comprising low-resistance flexible conductors, bypass diodes, and quick-connect terminals compatible with MPPT charge controllers. Variant 87 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Thin-film solar cell assembly for portable charging devices unit
detail_patents.abstract: A thin-film solar cell assembly (CIGS or CdTe) for portable charging devices, laminated onto a flexible foldable substrate, connected to an MPPT charge controller and lithium polymer battery with USB-C output for mobile device charging. Variant 88 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered charging case for mobile electronic devices design
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered charging case for mobile electronic devices comprising photovoltaic cells on the external surface, a rechargeable battery within the case structure, MPPT charge control circuitry, and a USB-C connector for charging the enclosed device. Variant 89 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Photovoltaic panel cleaning device for portable solar chargers arrangement
detail_patents.abstract: A cleaning device for maintaining the photovoltaic panels of portable solar chargers, comprising a microfiber pad and antistatic spray bottle attachment connected to the solar panel frame, improving solar cell efficiency by removing dust and debris. Variant 90 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar irradiance sensor for portable photovoltaic charging optimization configuration
detail_patents.abstract: A solar irradiance sensor module for portable photovoltaic charging systems, comprising a photodiode array and microcontroller that communicates with the MPPT charge controller to optimize solar panel orientation and charging parameters. Variant 91 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Heat dissipation system for solar cell charger electronics system
detail_patents.abstract: A heat dissipation system for portable solar cell charger electronics comprising thermally conductive pads, heat spreader plates, and ventilated housing designed to maintain optimal operating temperature of the MPPT controller and lithium-ion battery during solar charging. Variant 92 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered wireless charging pad with photovoltaic cells apparatus
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered wireless charging pad comprising photovoltaic cells on the upper surface, Qi wireless charging coils on the lower surface, an MPPT solar charge controller, an integrated battery, and USB-C wired charging fallback. Variant 93 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Hybrid solar and kinetic energy portable charger mechanism
detail_patents.abstract: A hybrid portable charger combining foldable photovoltaic solar panels with a kinetic energy harvester, a dual-input charge controller with MPPT for solar and rectification for kinetic power, a lithium-ion battery, and USB-C output ports. Variant 94 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar panel mounting bracket for portable charger deployment structure
detail_patents.abstract: A mounting bracket system for deploying portable solar charger panels at optimal angles, comprising adjustable tilt arms, a base plate with non-slip surface, and panel retention clips compatible with foldable photovoltaic charger assemblies. Variant 95 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar powered emergency charging kit with photovoltaic panel assembly
detail_patents.abstract: A solar powered emergency charging kit comprising a foldable photovoltaic panel, a compact MPPT charge controller, a lithium-ion battery, a USB-C output cable, and an LED flashlight, packaged in a weather-resistant case for emergency outdoor use. Variant 96 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: High-efficiency solar charger with perovskite photovoltaic cells module
detail_patents.abstract: A high-efficiency portable solar charger employing perovskite photovoltaic cells on a foldable flexible substrate, an MPPT charge controller optimized for perovskite cell characteristics, a lithium polymer battery, and USB-C fast charging output. Variant 97 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Solar charged power bank with charge level indicator unit
detail_patents.abstract: A solar charged power bank comprising monocrystalline photovoltaic cells on the exterior surface, an MPPT charge controller, a lithium-ion battery with LED charge level indicator, and USB-C bidirectional port for both solar-independent charging and device output. Variant 98 includes additional efficiency improvements.

detail_patents.title: Dual-sided solar panel portable charger design
detail_patents.abstract: A dual-sided (bifacial) solar panel portable charger having photovoltaic cells on both faces of foldable panels to capture direct and reflected solar radiation, an MPPT charge controller, a battery management system, and USB-C power output. Variant 99 includes additional efficiency improvements.
